name: Sugimura Warehouse Co., Ltd.
summary: Sugimura Warehouse Co., Ltd. engages in the warehousing, customs clearance, and real estate rental businesses in Japan. It is also involved in the general logistics activities, including logistics processing, document management, storage management, transport and delivery services, and logistics information system; and port transport and freight transportation handling services. The company was founded in 1895 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.
